title: SPK Server Mod Pack
description: The original power generation-oriented mod pack for players in Saint PeteKun, compiled by Ch1m4.
body:
### EN:
This modpack is created for players of Saint PeteKun, featuring essential technical Minecraft mods such as Tweakeroo and Litematica, along with quality-of-life mods like dynamic lighting, footstep sounds, and chat avatars. However, this modpack is not required to play on Saint PeteKun, as the server only requires the vanilla game. It is provided for players who wish to join the Saint PeteKun server but prefer not to search for technical modpacks separately.

We will provide updates when Saint PeteKun undergoes version transitions or if bugs are found in the modpack. If you encounter any issues, you can contact me via the email below for assistance:
Email: t3ouserve1328@126.com

The inclusion of mods created by others in this modpack was done without explicit permission. For safety reasons, it must not be used for commercial purposes. If this pack constitutes any infringement, please contact me via the email above for removal.

### CN:
针对圣彼德坤（**Saint PeteKun**）玩家们制作的模组整合包，内含tweakeroo、litematica等基础生电模组，以及动态光源、脚步声、聊天头像等优化体验的模组，但这不是游玩圣彼德坤必备的整合包，圣彼德坤只需要原版游戏就可以进入，发布此整合包是为想要游玩圣彼德坤服务器但又不想另外寻找生电整合包的玩家们使用。

我们会在圣彼德坤周目更替或整合包出现Bug时提供更新，如果你遇到了问题，那么你可以通过下面的邮箱来联系我解决
邮箱：**t3ouserve1328@126.com**

将其他人的模组编入此整合包的行为是没有获取许可的，谨慎起见，它不能用于商业用途，如果此包构成了侵权行为，请通过上方的邮箱联系我删除
